_comment: Wave 14PH scaffold. UpdateCheckService.cs polls https://glyphfex.com/api/version.json once per day on every installed app to detect new releases. Update this file as the final step of every release per Installer/RELEASE-PROCESS.md. The placeholders below stay in place until the first signed MSI ships; at that point bump latest_version, paste the release URL, paste the SHA-256.
